kill_clip.name: Kill Clip
kill_clip.description: Reloading after a kill grants increased damage.

target_lock.name: Target Lock (Max)
target_lock.description: Continued damage increases output. Value shown at maximum stacks.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: After 12s in combat, increases damage, handling, and reload.

surrounded.name: Surrounded
surrounded.description: Increased damage when three or more enemies are nearby.

golden_tricorn_x2.name: Golden Tricorn ×2
golden_tricorn_x2.description: After a weapon kill of matching damage type.

golden_tricorn_x3.name: Golden Tricorn ×3
golden_tricorn_x3.description: After an ability kill of matching damage type.

explosive_light.name: Explosive Light
explosive_light.description: Picking up an orb increases damage for the next shot.

bait_and_switch.name: Bait and Switch
bait_and_switch.description: Dealing damage with all three equipped weapons briefly grants increased damage.

one_two_punch.name: One-Two Punch
one_two_punch.description: Hitting an enemy with every pellet in a shot briefly increases melee damage. (Shotgun-only)

radiant.name: Radiant
radiant.description: Solar subclass buff. Increases weapon damage against all targets.

empowering_rift.name: Empowering Rift
empowering_rift.description: Warlock empowering rift. Boosts weapon damage while active.

weapons_of_light.name: Weapons of Light
weapons_of_light.description: Titan Ward of Dawn bubble perk. Increases weapon damage.

well_of_radiance.name: Well of Radiance
well_of_radiance.description: Warlock Well of Radiance. Increases weapon damage while standing in it.

high_energy_fire.name: High-Energy Fire
high_energy_fire.description: While Charged with Light, gain a damage bonus. Consumes a stack on kill.
